recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: A woman and her son enlist a motley crew of so-called spiritual experts to help rid their home of supernatural squatters.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: Godless Youth
recommendations.overview: German students compete to enter one of the country's elite schools.

recommendations.title: The Big Shave
recommendations.overview: A young man walks into a meticulously clean and sterile bathroom and proceeds to shave away hair, then skin, in an increasingly bloody and graphic bathroom scene.

recommendations.title: Beached Tuna
recommendations.overview: Francesco,  a young man who wants to be a comedian, insults his girlfriend to make his public laugh; she will break up with and so he will think of a crazy plan to win her back.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser
recommendations.overview: A hedonistic man finds a mysterious puzzle box that summons a group of gruesome beings known as the Cenobites. These otherworldly entities open the doors to a dominion where pain and pleasure are indivisible.

recommendations.title: The Conference
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group of public sector employees battle not only their own discord but also a bloodthirsty killer during a seemingly innocuous retreat.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling with addiction comes into possession of an ancient puzzle box, unaware that its purpose is to summon the Cenobites, a group of sadistic supernatural beings from another dimension.

recommendations.title: An American Haunting
recommendations.overview: An invisible entity haunts a 19th century family, and family secrets soon begin to surface. Based on the true events of the only case in US History where a spirit caused the death of a man.
